chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 3997 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 18447/23 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2023. Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocates for Petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for respondents along with Tariq Aziz, Principal Appraiser (SAPT). Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. G.M Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General. -------------- Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition as it has served its purpose. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
